prompt: Hotel comparison report for the Birch/Kowalski wedding (May 14-16 2027, Biltmore Estate, Asheville) with two edge cases: a very long room type name (Grand Bohemian) and a hotel with no verifiable TripAdvisor ranking (The Radical).
assertions: Output is a valid .docx that opens without errors
Every blank spacer paragraph is exactly 6pt or 10pt — no 10.5pt or default-size blank paragraphs anywhere
The table containing the long room type 'Premier Two Queen Mountain View Suite with Balcony and Kitchenette' does not exceed the usable page width
The Radical's TripAdvisor line reads 'TripAdvisor rating not verified' (no invented ranking)
The unverified TripAdvisor ranking is surfaced to the user as a Needs Verification item in the agent's summary
Grand Bohemian ranking is hyperlinked and formatted exactly as '#18 of 28 Hotels in Asheville'
The JC Room Blocks contact line appears exactly once, as the last paragraph of the document
Divider lines between hotel sections use the thinThickThinMediumGap paragraph border
